# Adrevnview — LLM / GEO reference

> Adrevnview is a premium full-service digital agency for B2B, B2C, and enterprise brands.

## About
- Name: Adrevnview
- Website: https://www.adrevnview.com

- Location: Long Island, New York, USA

## Services
- Custom web design
- Web development and integrations
- eCommerce design and development
- Branding and brand identity
- SEO and digital marketing
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- Website redesign

## Products
- Google NFC Review Card ($99): https://www.adrevnview.com/googlenfc
  - NFC + QR card that sends customers to Google review page
  - No app required, pre-programmed, lifetime guarantee
